title: Billie Eilish’s New Fragrance Is Perfect for the Cold Weather & Doubles as Decor
summary: The perfume serves as a sequel to the singer's first Your Turn fragrance.
body: All products and services featured are independently chosen by editors. However, Billboard may receive a commission on orders placed through its retail links, and the retailer may receive certain auditable data for accounting purposes. We’re declaring Billie Eilish’s new fragrance our optimal choice to spritz this spring. The “Lovely” singer’s latest entry into the world of perfume, Your Turn II , just hit shelves in-store and online at Ulta Beauty and serves as a sequel to Eilish’s perfume Your Turn that launched back in 2025. This second launch retails for $90 and features notes we’re pretty sure you’ve never experienced in a fragrance before. You’ve got top notes of pimento berry, Mirabelle plum and cassis leaves that come through fruity from the plum, woody from the cassis leaves and spicy from the pimento (yes, like what you find in the cheese). Middle notes are fig nectar, black tea and vanilla orchid that offer a sweet and medicinal quality, while the base offers more woody and earthy qualities with notes of natural vetiver, olibanum resin and cedarwood. Overall, the fragrance is described as woody and fruity, which inst…

title: The Google Weather Android ‘app’ is going away
summary: Google is getting rid of Android’s de facto Weather app in favor of Search results. This deprecation slowly started a few months ago, but is now picking up steam. more…
